params.amountA: Amount of token A to deposit
params.amountB: Amount of token B to deposit

params.liquidity: Amount of LP tokens to burn
params.minAmountA: Minimum amount of token A to receive (slippage protection)
params.minAmountB: Minimum amount of token B to receive (slippage protection)

addLiquidity(uint256,uint256).notice: Initialize the pool with first liquidity

getAmountOut(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Calculate output amount using constant product formula

getPriceA().notice: Get current price of tokenA in terms of tokenB

getPriceB().notice: Get current price of tokenB in terms of tokenA

removeLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Remove liquidity and get back tokens
